expectations.text: Output starts with '# 審查' header identifying translation-bias.md
expectations.evidence: Header is '# Translation-Bias Reference Review Report' — English, no '審查'.
Uses 10 free-form sections but not the skill's numbered check structure (e.g., '## 1. Divine Name Convention Violations').

expectations.text: Output ends with a summary table with | 檢查 | 結果 | format
expectations.evidence: Summary uses | Category | Count | in English, not | 檢查 | 結果 |.

expectations.text: Summary includes total issue count and check count
expectations.evidence: '**Total issues** | **33**' at end of summary table.

expectations.text: Report does NOT auto-fix any content
expectations.evidence: All findings are reports only, no auto-fixes.

eval_feedback.overall: Baseline found more issues (33 vs 17) with broader coverage but lacked structured Chinese format.
